1.

## Captured frames (if applicable)

If the issue is protocol-related, please attach a wire capture (hex
dump from a sniffer) showing the problematic transaction. Sanitize
any sensitive data first.

```
TX: ...
RX: ...
```

## Additional context

Anything else that might be relevant.
